overall.description: Driving sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle traveling along a futuristic elevated highway. The scene transitions from a covered tunnel section to an open bridge with holographic advertisements and a cyberpunk cityscape visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated highway with directional signage

events.description: vehicle accelerates from behind a large Militech truck and begins overtaking maneuver
successfully overtakes the large black truck, moving into the left lane

agents.ego_description: driving forward on a multi-lane elevated highway, following and then overtaking a large armored truck

notable_agents.action: large black Militech truck driving ahead, later overtaken on the right

entered.detail: metal truss ceiling with cyan accent lighting spanning the highway
illuminated signs with white arrows indicating directions mounted on the ceiling
large black armored truck with red taillights and Militech branding
solid concrete barrier wall on the left side of the highway
concrete divider barrier on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the vehicle positioned behind a large Militech truck on a covered elevated highway. The ceiling features a metal truss structure with cyan accent lighting and directional signage. The vehicle accelerates and overtakes the truck, with concrete barriers visible on both sides of the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge highway with structural trusses and distant city views

events.description: natural dusk sky becomes visible through gaps in the bridge structure as the vehicle emerges from deep cover
passing large diagonal steel support beams, revealing mountain range in the distance on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive forward at high speed, passing through structural support sections of the bridge

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving in the right lane, maintaining parallel speed

entered.detail: large X-shaped diagonal steel beams forming the bridge structural supports
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows visible on the left horizon
mountain silhouette visible on the horizon against the purple dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the elevated highway as the environment transitions from enclosed to semi-open. Large diagonal steel trusses dominate the structure, and the dusk sky becomes visible through the gaps. Mountains appear on the right horizon while cyberpunk city buildings emerge on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic skyway with holographic ceiling advertisements and urban canyon views

events.description: large holographic advertisements activate on the ceiling and right wall, displaying cyan-tinted imagery
silver sedan overtakes the vehicle on the left side

agents.ego_description: driving through a futuristic highway section with prominent holographic displays, maintaining high speed alongside other traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan overtaking in the left lane, moving ahead of the ego vehicle

entered.detail: large transparent holographic screens suspended from the ceiling showing advertisements and sky imagery
cyan-lit digital projection screens on the right wall showing circular patterns
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with neon lighting and holographic billboards
illuminated vertical light fixtures with cyan glow along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the vehicle driving through a highly futuristic section of the highway with prominent holographic advertisements covering the ceiling and right wall. The left side reveals a dense cyberpunk city skyline with neon lights, while the vehicle is overtaken by a silver sedan. The environment is fully open to the dusk sky with sophisticated lighting fixtures lining the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic elevated highway that transforms from a confined industrial tunnel into a sprawling, neon-lit cityscape under a dusk sky. It begins behind a large Militech truck beneath a metal truss ceiling accented with cyan lighting, accelerating to overtake the vehicle between concrete barriers. As the road progresses, the enclosed structure gives way to semi-open steel trusses, revealing distant mountains on the right and the first silhouettes of city buildings on the left. The scene then expands into a highly futuristic corridor where holographic advertisements cover the ceiling and walls, while the left side opens fully to a dense skyline of neon lights. Finally, the vehicle continues forward under sophisticated road lighting as a silver sedan speeds past, moving deeper into the open urban expanse.
